data.title: Cantor Fitzgerald Unveils ‘No-Cap’ Bitcoin Fund With Built-In Gold Protection
data.description:
TL;DR Unlimited Growth Potential: The “no cap” Cantor Fitzgerald Bitcoin fund offers investors uncapped exposure to Bitcoin’s explosive growth while leveraging a five-year investment structure. Built-In Safety Net: A unique 1-to-1 downside protection mechanism, tied to gold prices, offsets Bitcoin’s volatility, providing a robust hedge during market downturns. Bridging Two Worlds: Cantor Fitzgerald blends decades.
source: https://crypto-economy.com/cantor-fitzgerald-unveils-no-cap-bitcoin-fund-with-built-in-gold-protection/

data.title: Binance Alpha to List Bondex (BDXN) With Exclusive Airdrop for Eligible Users
data.description: Binance Alpha is excited to announce the exclusive launch of Bondex (BDXN), making it the first platform to list BDXN.BDXN Alpha Spot Trading: Opens on June 3, 2025, at 10:00 (UTC) BDXN Futures Trading: Starts at 10:30 (UTC) on the same dayTo celebrate the listing, an exclusive airdrop event will be launched for eligible Binance Alpha users.How to Participate in the Bondex (BDXN) Airdrop:Eligibility: Users must have a qualifying number of Binance Alpha PointsAirdrop Claim: Available through the Alpha event page (launches June 3)Activity Rules: Full guidelines will be published alongside the event pageBondex, a decentralized talent ecosystem powered by Web3, is making waves with its innovative approach to recruitment, networking, and career building using blockchain technology.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Transfers 1,000 ETH to Associated Address
data.description: According to PANews, the Ethereum Foundation's EthDev has internally transferred 1,000 ETH, valued at approximately $2.6 million, to an associated address identified as 0xc061...0B6d. This address was previously funded by EF1.

data.title: Justin Sun will have a live conversation with James Wynn, the contract giant, and Moonpig, the meme project: revealing the future of the meme track and the outlook for the crypto market in 2025
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official social media of Huobi HTX, Huobi HTX Global Advisor Justin Sun will conduct a live broadcast at 20:00 (UTC+8) on June 1, and have a dialogue with the contract giant James Wynn and the Solana chain Meme project Moonpig team to discuss the future development trend of the Meme track and the performance of the crypto market in 2025. This event will be broadcast simultaneously through Huobi Live and Huobi HTX's X Space.

data.title: Trader Eugene: James Wynn may be a positive figure in this circle
Canary Staked CRO ETF Files for SEC Approval to List on Exchange
data.description: According to Odaily, Canary Staked CRO ETF has submitted an S-1 registration statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), seeking approval to list on an exchange. The ETF aims to provide exposure to the price of Cronos (CRO) by holding CRO and participating in transaction validation on the Cronos POS chain, while also earning additional CRO income. The net asset value (NAV) of the ETF will be calculated based on the market price of CRO.

data.title: Federal Reserve Meeting Highlights Inflation Concerns and Economic Uncertainty
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the latest Federal Reserve meeting minutes reveal that officials generally believe inflation may persist longer than previously anticipated, adding uncertainty to the global economic outlook. The meeting underscored the significant impact of inflation expectations on economic decisions, while also highlighting the rising risks of both inflation and unemployment, posing additional challenges for policymakers.

In this macroeconomic context, investors are focusing on effectively managing asset risks and maintaining stable investments. The emphasis is on finding strategies to navigate market volatility and safeguard investments amid ongoing inflation pressures.

The meeting's insights suggest that investors need to be vigilant and adaptable in their investment strategies to mitigate risks associated with inflation and economic fluctuations. Policymakers are tasked with addressing these challenges to ensure economic stability and growth.

data.title: MetaMask co-founder Dan Finlay outlines plan to expand crypto wallet to wider audience
data.description:
Catenaa, Friday, May 30, 2025-MetaMask co-founder Dan Finlay detailed the company’s strategy to grow beyond crypto enthusiasts and reach a broader user base, speaking on The Block’s podcast, The Crypto Beat. In the episode released Tuesday, Finlay joined The Block’s Head of Growth Tim Copeland to discuss MetaMask’s evolution alongside the broader crypto industry and […]

data.title: BNB Surpasses 670 USDT with a Narrowed 2.31% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On May 30, 2025, 10:24 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 670 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 670.159973 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.31% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Canary Staked CRO ETF Files S-1 Form for Listing
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Canary Staked CRO ETF has submitted an S-1 registration statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) and plans to be listed on the exchange. The ETF aims to achieve exposure to CRO prices by holding Cronos (CRO) and participating in transaction verification of the Cronos POS chain, while earning additional CRO income. The net asset value (NAV) of the ETF will be calculated based on the market price of CRO.
